title: Arizona Mahoney
writer: Zane Grey, Stuart Anthony, Robert Yost
actors: Joe Cook, Robert Cummings, June Martel
plot: When Sue Bixby becomes his new boss, stagecoach robber Talbot reforms and goes after her rustled cattle. When he and his men are outnumbered fighting Lloyd's gang, Randall rides to get circus man Mahoney and his man shooting cannon.
